subject: fix(cleanup): remove dev-only debugLog from SampleImagesSection
body:
debugLog only renders via DebugPill in dev mode, making it useless
for diagnosing caching issues in the production PWA. Removed both
calls and the import.

Tags: cleanup, media, sample-images
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: sample-images
Semver: patch
